case_title: VASUMATHI RAMAN ET AL VS. 460 NATOMA LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: CARMEL ANNE KAVANAGH) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMAN, VASUMATHI O'MAHONY, EOIN AS TO DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (**NO SIGNATURE** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED AUG-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-07-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VASUMATHI RAMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EOIN O'MAHONY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CARMEL KAVANAGH (ADMINISTRATOR FOR ESTATE OF JAMES KAVANAGH, OWNER OF THE 460 NATOMA LLC), JOSE FELIPE NOVELO (INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR), AND JOHN P. MCGRATH (ATTORNEY FOR ESTATE OF JAMES KAVANAGH, THE OWNER OF THE 460 NATOMA LLC). PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS INVALID. DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. COURT INFORMS DEFENDANT THAT ATTORNEYS ARE NOT PERMITTED TO REPRESENT EITHER PLAINTIFFS OR DEFENDANTS IN SMALL CLAIMS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CARMEL KAVANAGH, ADMINISTRATOR FOR ESTATE OF JAMES KAVANAGH, OWNER OF 460 NATOMA, LLC. FILED BY DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOHN MCGRATH, ATTORNEY FOR ESTATE OF JAMES KAVANAGH, OWNER OF 460 NATOMA, LLC. FILED BY DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED OCT-10-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-06-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS VASUMATHI RAMAN AND EOIN O'MAHONY ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC, REPRESENTED BY CARMEL KAVANAGH, ADMINISTRATOR FOR THE ESTATE OF JAMES KAVANAGH IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,630.00 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO BE PAID BY CHECK. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE MET AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED AT THAT TIME. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSE FELIPE NOVELO, INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMAN, VASUMATHI O'MAHONY, EOIN AS TO DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINAUNCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
